creator: mva@FreeBSD.org
text:

[...]

>

>

> FreeBSD 7 (.) updated on 2006-09-07 12:48:57 - i386
> FreeBSD 7 (.) updated on 2006-09-07 23:35:53 - amd64
> maybe your is older ?
> 

No, mine is from 2006-09-09 17:32:16 - i386. I really wonder why it
cannot find libcurl.so.3 on your box.

Regards
Marcus
